hero.headline: OCR Accuracy Comparison Study 2025

summary: This comprehensive study compares OCR accuracy across different technologies, testing performance on invoices, receipts, financial documents, and forms under varying conditions including image quality, document layouts, and text clarity.

whyPdfExcelAiFits: Achieves 99%+ accuracy on clear typed documents like invoices
Handles batch processing for consistent document types

limitations: Handwritten text recognition accuracy drops significantly compared to typed text
Very poor image quality or heavily damaged documents may require manual processing

faq.question: How accurate is OCR on scanned invoices in 2025?
faq.answer: Modern OCR achieves 95-99% accuracy on clear, typed invoices, but drops to 70-85% on handwritten receipts or poor-quality scans.

faq.question: What document types show the highest OCR accuracy?
faq.answer: Digital PDFs and clean scanned documents with standard fonts perform best, while handwritten forms and faded receipts show lower accuracy.

faq.question: How does image quality affect OCR accuracy?
faq.answer: High-resolution images (300+ DPI) with good contrast achieve significantly better results than low-quality phone photos or faded documents.

faq.question: Which OCR solution offers the best price-to-accuracy ratio?
faq.answer: Cost-effectiveness depends on your document types and volume, with specialized solutions often outperforming generic OCR on specific formats.
